_meta.statuses: Actively Recruiting / Open - Limited = recovery period open to new claimants; Closed = no new claims; no badge = active MDL, intake status unverified
_meta.intakeVerification: 2026-06-11: every joinable MDL checked against current reporting/settlement sites. closed = removed from joinable pool (Kia-3052, Philips-3014, Zostavax-2848, Evenflo-2938, FutureMotion-3087, McKinsey-2996, Opiate-2804, TaxotereEye-3023).

mdls.name: Johnson & Johnson Talcum Powder Products Litigation
mdls.intakeNote: Flagship mass-tort intake confirmed open by current (2026) reporting; no court claim deadline — each claimant's SOL controls. Join via plaintiffs' counsel.
